name: openEuler sig-SBC SIG
description: The SBC SIG aims at migrating openEuler to various single-board computers, in order to reduce the threshold for using openEuler and promote openEuler to new users.

name: openEuler sig-SBC SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-SBC SIG maintains 17 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SBC SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The SBC SIG aims at migrating openEuler to various single-board computers, in order to reduce the threshold for using openEuler and promote openEuler to new users.. The SIG has 8 core members and maintains 17 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-SBC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-SBC SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-SBC SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SBC SIG maintains 17 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-SBC.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-SBC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-SBC SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Wang Jianmin, Wayne Ren, Fang Yafen. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
